testcase.name: questions_no_consent_and_foreign_prefix_returns_412_consent_takes_precedence
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-18T09:12:00.958+04:00 INFO 75996 --- [anonymous-service] [o-auto-1-exec-3] c.l.a.service.AnonSessionService : anon_session_mint id=77732144577216 ttlSec=86400 entrySource=null 2026-05-18T09:12:00.965+04:00 INFO 75996 --- [anonymous-service] [o-auto-1-exec-4] c.l.a.controller.AnonQuestionController : anon_question_create idempotency_key=*** session_id=77732144577216 object_key=guest-tmp/88888888/double-bad.jpg subject=biology 2026-05-18T09:12:00.971+04:00 INFO 75996 --- [anonymous-service] [o-auto-1-exec-4] c.l.a.service.AnonQuestionService : anon_question consent_required session_id=77732144577216
